programme.title: Heavy Pumping
programme.desc: Ditch the pre-workout and let the riffs do the heavy lifting. This high-octane blast of speed and power is designed to fuel your gains or ignite a living room mosh pit. High BPMs, crushing drums, and zero excuses.

programme.title: New Rock And Metal Videos For You
programme.desc: Stay ahead of the curve with the freshest drops from the global underground. From world premieres to the latest studio masterpieces, we’ve gathered the newest sonic assaults in one place. If it’s loud and new, it’s here.

programme.title: Flying V
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live In Hamburg
programme.desc: Ein legendärer Auftritt einer Hardrock-Legende in Hamburg! Diese Aufnahme vereint frisches Material mit zeitlosen Klassikern. Eine musikalische Reise durch mehr als dreißig Jahre Rockgeschichte, die pure Energie und Nostalgie verspricht.

programme.title: Together We Rise
programme.desc: A tribute to the global brotherhood that refuses to fit in. This collection celebrates the unity that turns fans into a tribe. In this pit, no one stands alone—together, we are the loudest force on earth.

programme.title: Endless Heavyness
programme.desc: Dive into pure power and unrelenting energy. Endless Heavyness is a non-stop wall of sound designed to hit hard and stay loud. No pauses, no compromises—just the most massive tracks to keep the momentum going. It’s not just loud; it’s eternal.

programme.title: Where Heavy Music Lives
programme.desc: Your official gateway to the underground. Discover your first distorted riff or find a circle of peers who "get it." Welcome to the neighborhood—it’s loud, it’s proud, and there’s always room for one more.

programme.title: Metal That Rocks
programme.desc: Where rock 'n' roll swagger meets the weight of metal. This collection bridges the gap, featuring everything from anthemic hard rock to core-shaking classics. It’s loud, it’s proud, and it’s built to move you.

programme.title: Bay Area Godfathers
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live in London - 30th Anniversary Concert
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: From The Scene For The Scene
programme.desc: Go beyond the music and into the heart of the underground. This collection pairs heavy-hitting videos with exclusive band interviews and reports from metal capitals worldwide. Built by the scene, for the scene.

programme.title: Finnish Metal Special
programme.desc: From the frozen North comes a sound of haunting melodies and raw intensity. Dive into Finland’s finest, where melancholic atmospheres meet the power of the thousand lakes. It’s a masterclass in darkness and ice-cold riffs.

programme.title: The Home of Heavy
programme.desc: Step into the headquarters for everything that shakes the earth. From the pillars of the classics to the pioneers of the new era, this is where the heart of metal beats loudest. This is where you belong.

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live in London - 40th Anniversary Concert
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Your Pulse Of Metal
programme.desc: Sync your heartbeat to the complex rhythms of the underground. This collection dives into technical mastery and hidden gems that push your adrenaline. If you’re ready to feel the music in your veins, we’ve got the tracks.

programme.title: For Metalheads Only
programme.desc: Leave the rock anthems at the door—this is 100% pure steel. We’ve dialed the distortion to eleven for a lineup strictly for the heavy-duty fans. No compromises, no fillers, just total sonic devastation.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S02 : E09 Winter
programme.desc: What should you do in a wild winter blizzard? Bake! Host Jessica McGovern makes sweet winter treats like an extravagant Gingerbread Chalet.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S02 : E10 Paris
programme.desc: Charismatic host Jessica McGovern whips up classic desserts from the beautiful city of Paris.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S02 : E11 Country Fair
programme.desc: Country fair treats made right at home! Host Jessica McGovern makes tasty fair-inspired desserts like classic Funnel Cake.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E19 Rice and Rosemary
programme.desc: In this "R" challenge, Chef Lauren Gulyas shows us how to use rice and rosemary in delicious meals.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 Lamb and Licorice
programme.desc: After picking the letter "L," Chef Robert Jewell takes on lamb and licorice in this ingredient challenge. He starts with aromatic Moroccan lamb riblets, an appetizer that will make you want this spicy dish as your main course too. Next, Robert takes it up a notch by showing us how to make licorice - yes, the candy! He brings coconut oil, brown sugar, creamed coconut, and molasses to boil before skillfully adding flour and anise to make sweet, chewy coconut licorice. Finally, Robert concocts the perfect recipe that combines succulent lamb with sweet licorice.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E12 Radicchio and Raisins
programme.desc: Host Theresa Visintin creates savoury meals in this letter "R" challenge featuring radicchios and raisins. First, Theresa chops up bold and bitter radicchios, grilling them until the edges are a crispy golden brown and perfect for a warm wedge salad. Then, she tosses fried pancetta and earthy portobello mushrooms in a luxurious champagne vinegar and pours it over the crispy radicchio. Theresa tops this warm salad with creamy crumbled goat's cheese. For her next dish, Theresa prepares a rum raisin sauce using golden sultana raisins, dark rum, and fresh orange. Theresa pours the sauce over succulent ham. Is your mouth watering yet? Finally, Theresa combines radicchio and raisin into a colourful and delicious side dish.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E20 Pork and Peanuts
programme.desc: It's all about pork and peanuts, today's challenge is the letter "P." Chef Lauren Gulyas serves up an old school favourite, smothered pork chops. Using a blend of savoury ingredients, and with the help of her cast iron pan, Chef Lauren provides us with tips on how to keep your pork tender and tasty. Next, it's time for a West African peanut soup. Drizzling garlic, ginger and onions with extra virgin olive oil and letting them sizzle in a frying pan until the onions are soft brings out a sweetness that lends itself beautifully to the salty, earthy taste of peanuts. To finish, Chef Lauren puts an Asian twist on a southern classic, when she combines the two ingredients.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Easy Weeknight Recipes for Busy Days
programme.desc: Host Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks her way from Monday to Friday with four delicious dishes, including a Roast Beef feast and velvety Earl Grey Pudding.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Fast and Flavourful Dinners for Monday to Thursday
programme.desc: Home cook Vanessa Gianfrancesco uses her multi-cooker to whip up four comforting weeknight meals that are fast and easy.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Weeknight Dishes made in Little Thyme
programme.desc: Who has "thyme" to make dinner after a hectic day? Host Vanessa Gianfrancesco inspires with four recipes including a Mushroom Thyme Risotto.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Sweet, Salty, and Surprising Multi-Cooker Recipes
programme.desc: Using a multi-cooker, charming host Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks up a four dishes that are salty, sweet, and surprising.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S02 : E12 Sweet & Salty Desserts
programme.desc: Which tasty treats tantalize your taste buds? Sweet and salty ones, of course! Host Jessica McGovern shows us some of her favourites.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S02 : E13 Rainbow Galaxy Party
programme.desc: Nothing is more mesmerizing than outer space! Host Jessica McGovern bakes delicious desserts with a galaxy-inspired twist.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Italian Sweets
programme.desc: Host Jessica McGovern bakes up some delightful Italian classics including a crumbly Cherry-pistachio Biscotti.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Fancy French Flavours
programme.desc: Talented baker Jessica McGovern shows us how to get fancy with three stunning French desserts.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E05 Coconut and Crab
programme.desc: In this "C" challenge, Chef Robert Jewell cooks up recipes using coconut and crab before combining both into a single recipe. Using sweet coconut, Robert makes a classic dessert -- an irresistible coconut cream pie. He starts with a delectable crunchy graham cracker crust and tops his pie with fluffy whipped cream and toasted coconut flakes. Next, Robert transforms a fresh soft-shell crab into a delicious, spicy, and crunchy dish. The best part? It's fast and easy to make. After soaking the crab in milk, Robert dunks it into a flour-cornmeal mixture and fries it until golden brown. But that's not all, Robert whips up the perfect dipping sauce, using spicy smoked- jalapeno, lime, and orange adobo mayo. Finally, Robert brings coconut and crab into one delicious dish.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E13 Sesame and Scallops
programme.desc: It's all about sesame and scallops in this letter "S" challenge, and host Theresa Visintin has some appetizing ideas up her sleeve. First, she shows us how to make scallop cassoulet, a simple recipe that can be cooked even faster than it can eaten! Theresa browns the tender scallops in delicious bacon fat and then bakes it on a bed of creamy kidney beans. Next, Theresa uses sesame seeds to create a zesty sauce for a take-out favourite, made in your very own kitchen - noodles! For her final recipe, our culinary host combines sesame and scallops, creating a juicy, crunchy masterpiece.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E21 Water Chestnut and Watercress
programme.desc: Making dishes with the letter “W” could be seen as a real challenge, but Chef Lauren Gulyas has got it covered. Choosing water chestnut and watercress as her star ingredients, Chef Lauren begins by serving up an Asian inspired rice dish complete with crunchy water chestnuts. She starts off cooking rice in chicken broth, a great way to infuse the grain with a subtle savoury flavour. Sautéing celery, garlic, and onion in sesame oil adds a flavour kick. Throw in some ginger, veggies, and water chestnuts and enjoy the sound of the sizzle. Next up, Lauren puts a peppery twist on a classic recipe, linguine with watercress pesto. Then it’s time for the grand finale, Chef Lauren uses both ingredients to create the ultimate culinary combination.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 Tea and Turkey
programme.desc: Tea and turkey are an unlikely combo for a meal, but Chef Robert Jewell is a creative force in the kitchen. First, he gives earl grey and lavender tea a sweet treatment by making a rich semifreddo. Robert creates a silky tea infused syrup, which he drizzles over a luxurious custard and tops with whipped cream. Robert punches up the colour by adding tart poached raspberries and vibrant violet lavender petals. Now, it's time for a real show stopper - saffron turkey kebabs with pomegranate rice. This is not your average turkey dinner. First, Robert marinates the turkey pieces in lime, yogourt and garlic. After infusing basmati rice with aromatic saffron and bay leaves, Robert tosses the rice with crunchy pine nuts and sweet pomegranate - the perfect bed for his grilled to- perfection turkey skewers. Robert then takes his culinary skills to the next level when he uses tea and turkey in one single delicious dish.

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Hamburger Heaven
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make hamburgers with sides and dessert for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: smash burgers, pickle slaw, matchstick fries, and strawberry chocolate milkshakes!

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Beef-a-palooza
programme.desc: Grilling expert Spencer Watts hosts a tasty beef-a-palooza with four incredible beef cuts including smoked brisket and succulent beef tenderloin.

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Southern Brunch
programme.desc: Host Vanessa Gianfrancesco brings the heat to her brunch table with southern-style recipes including a Huevos Divorciados and Fried Chicken and Waffles.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 Shrimp and Sausage
programme.desc: It's all about the letter "S" as Chef Robert Jewell cooks up tasty meals using shrimp and sausage. For his first recipe, Robert fries up turmeric-spiced sweet potato fritters with a shrimp centre. He takes this tantalizing appetizer to another level with a savoury lime soy dipping sauce. Next up, Robert makes an English breakfast strata. This sausage casserole is easily the BEST way to start your day. He layers the bottom of the dish with buttered sourdough slices, before adding crispy fried sausages, leeks and tomatoes. He then covers it in a creamy egg mixture, crumbles stilton on top and bakes it to golden brown. Finally, Robert combines shrimp and sausage into one flavourful dish.

programme.title: Feed My Soul, V!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Memory Lane
programme.desc: Vanessa and Stefania take a delicious trip down memory lane with a menu of meaningful dishes and a table to match! There’s Tuscan beans, gnocchi with a duo of sauces, short rib braciole, chocolate semifreddo, and so much more!

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 Southern Barbeque Night
programme.desc: Host Spencer Watts cooks up a Southern-style feast for the whole family including Crunchy Coleslaw and Oven Barbeque Chicken all in under 30 minutes.

programme.title: MORE One Big Recipe
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Fancy Brunch
programme.desc: Re-join Chef Kimberly Lallouz in her One Big Recipe test kitchen as she masterfully creates a week night feast of braised oxtail and plantain waffles, Turkish eggs with spiced yogurt, grilled broccolini, and plum parfait with gluten-free granola.

programme.title: MORE One Big Recipe
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Hearty Favorites
programme.desc: Re-join Chef Kimberly Lallouz in her One Big Recipe test kitchen as she masterfully creates a week night feast of Swiss chard and pea salad with green apple vinaigrette, broccoli and cheddar soup, salt crusted lamb loin with lamb gravy, and a green apple panna cotta with crispy cheddar frico.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Honeycomb, Shallots and Iceberg Lettuce
programme.desc: Host Amanda Herrera transforms fresh market ingredients into two irresistible dishes, including a one pot Lamb Curry with Honeycomb.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Patty Pan Summer Squash and Cabbage
programme.desc: Host Amanda Herrera grills up two dinner recipes using patty pan summer squash and cabbage that she picked up from the market.

programme.desc: Unlock Gusto TV's top recipes on QR Countdown! Thousands of viewers scan our QR codes to access our delicious dishes. Now. we're serving up 8 of our most popular recipes featuring honey. from hosts like Shahir Massoud and Jessica McGovern.

programme.desc: Chef Michael Bonacini uses the fresh ingredients from rich Tuscan soil to make regional dishes like Spinach Ricotta Gnudi.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Le Marche
programme.desc: Celebrity Chef Michael Bonacini explores classic dishes from the central Italian region, Le Marche.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Abruzzo
programme.desc: The secluded region of Abruzzo makes for unique Italian cuisine. Chef Michael Bonacini shows us diverse regional recipes like Rolled Meat Crepes.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Puglia
programme.desc: Pasta, bread, pizza dough! Host Michael Bonacini makes Apulian classics like Artichoke Cheese Panzerotti.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Emilia Romagna
programme.desc: Emilia Romagna is the culinary heart of Italy and Chef Michael Bonacini shows viewers how to make some of the region's most delicious dishes.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 Fish Night
programme.desc: Kids don't always love fish - host Spencer Watts shares some simple, inexpensive, and tasty recipes that will change your kids' opinion of fish night.

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.sub-title: S05 : E12 Cakes and Icings with Chef Tim McRoberts
programme.desc: With ease and grace Chef Tim McRoberts bakes like a chef. Chef makes gorgeous chocolate molten cake, and demonstrates that art of working fondant.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E15 Cheese and Chocolate
programme.desc: Cheese or chocolate? Why not both! In this "C" challenge, host Theresa Visintin takes on both decadent ingredients. But first, she shows us that being cheesy is easy, especially when you stuff chicken breast with creamy goat's cheese and finely diced apples. Theresa takes the flavour one step further by coating the stuffed chicken with sage, parmesan, and panko bread crumbs, then frying it to a crispy golden brown. Next, Theresa whips up a dessert fan favourite, the decadent and oh-so-irresistible dark chocolate lava cake. Finally, Theresa has an irresistible recipe using ooey gooey cheese and warm chocolate.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 Sicily
programme.desc: Simplicity is key with Sicilian cuisine and Chef Michael Bonacini explores just how the region balances simplicity with intensity through four flavourful dishes. Starting with an antipasto of Folded Flatbread with Ricotta and Fennel Seeds, Michael inspires with its intricate beauty with a simple recipe. Keeping to the theme of simplicity, Michael shows that plenty of flavour can come from little ingredients in his primo of Broccoli and Sausage Rigatoni. The spicy sausage and chili is countered by a creamy broccoli pesto for a dish that highlights Sicilian cuisine. Michael turns to the Italian queen of crops for his secondo: Eggplant Parmesan Roll-Ups. With thin slices of eggplant rolled up to contain a mouth-watering mixture of mozzarella, provolone, and pecorino romano, this dish gets an extra kick of flavour from a coating of breadcrumbs and tomato sauce. To bring it all together, Michael combines spicy with sweet through his tender Spiced Chocolate Cookies.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Sweet, Salty, and Surprising Multi-Cooker Recipes
programme.desc: Using a multi-cooker, charming host Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks up a four dishes that are salty, sweet, and surprising.

programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make an Asian-inspired meal for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: honey garlic chicken, snap pea salad, and mango pudding!

programme.desc: Using cream, sunflower oil and cherry tomatoes from the market, host Amanda Herrera makes an irresistible pasta recipe and indulgent dessert.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Sweet, Salty, and Surprising Multi-Cooker Recipes
programme.desc: Using a multi-cooker, charming host Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks up a four dishes that are salty, sweet, and surprising.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Sicily
programme.desc: Rice Balls Stuffed with Seafood and Pistachio Cannoli are on the menu as Chef Michael Bonacini explores dishes from the Italian island of Sicily.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Piemonte
programme.desc: Piemonte cuisine is influenced by its mountainous terrain. Chef Michael Bonacini shows us how to make its warm regional dishes like Bagna Cauda.

programme.title: Up the Dish
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 Ceviche
programme.desc: Host Tiera Singh goes on a South American tour with Peruvian Ceviche. Marinated citrusy seabass and shrimp swim in a sea of sweet potatoes and creamy avocado - it's hard to beat! But Poppy Sandler takes a shot, and lands on Grilled Shrimp with a smoky charred Corn and Avocado salad, topped with garlic and lemon grilled jumbo shrimp. Next, Missy Hui indulges her sweet tooth with Vegan Key Lime Tarts. Her trick? Using avocado for extra cream and extra green. Branzino with Shishito and Mango is how Micah Trainor scales it up - her whole-fish-dish is pan-roasted and spiced with chaat masala, topped with mangoes and blistered shishito peppers for a five-star feast!

programme.title: Up the Dish
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Lasagna
programme.desc: How do you make any lasagna recipe better? Ask Tiera Singh to take it up, of course! Her 'Nonna-style' bechamel and Bolognese-based Lasagna is topped with melty mozzarella for a luscious and luxuriant dish. Tiera tosses it over to Poppy Sandler, whose sideways Seafood Lasagna mixes up mussels, shrimp, and a briny bechamel sauce - yum! Next, Micah Trainor makes a dressed-up vegetarian version of the classic - her Zucchini-Mushroom Lasagna Rolls with tangy sundried tomatoes, savoury ricotta cheese, and earthy mushroom duxelles is simply superlative. Missy Hui hits the sweet spot with her Chocolate Raspberry Dessert Lasagna; layers of rich white chocolate, thick raspberry coulis, and velvety mascarpone cheese come together for a dessert that's in the stratosphere!

programme.title: Up the Dish
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Dumplings
programme.desc: In this episode of Up the Dish, host Missy Hui goes back to her childhood with Chicken and Dumplings - comfort food for every age! The chicken-dumpling journey doesn't end there; Micah Trainor turns the dish upside down and inside out with her Chinese-inspired Chicken-Chive Gyoza, a crunchy-crispy dim sum delight, with an ovERS-the-top chili sauce! How does Poppy Sandler spice things up? Herb Gnudi with Red Pepper Sauce, a spicy-savoury dumpling that's coated in nutty brown butter and creamy ricotta cheese for extra oomph. Tiera Singh finishes with another European dish - Spinach Spaetzle and Crispy Prosciutto, straight from Germany! Chewy spaetzle, fresh spinach, crispy ham - this textural treat doesn't let up!

programme.title: Up the Dish
programme.sub-title: S01 : E18 Fennel Orange Salad
programme.desc: Host Tiera Singh gets the show on the road with her Italian- inspired Fennel Orange Salad. Seared sushi-grade tuna rests on top of a crunchy, zesty, tangy fennel and orange salad with a honey-vinegar dressing to sweeten it up! Micah Trainor's revamp? Five Spice Duck a L'Orange with a sugary caramelized orange sauce and duck fat fried potatoes - is it French? Chinese? Who knows, but it's delicious! Next, Poppy Sandler pulls off a vegetarian variation, with a Roasted Veggie Bouillabaisse, complete with musky morels, umami-packed kombu, and tender asparagus. Missy Hui finishes up with her Orange Licorice Panna Cotta - aromatic orange blossom honey and licorice-like fennel pollen make the dish a decadent denouement to this episode of Up the Dish!

programme.title: Up the Dish
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Moules Frites
programme.desc: Crack open a mussel or two, this episode of Up the Dish begins in Belgium, but please, no waffles! Host Micah Trainor makes Moules- Frites, mussels steamed in white wine and shows her trick for bistro- style French fries. Next, Tiera Singh steals the show with her Mussel Broth Vichyssoise and Smoked Mussels, an ultra-creamy cold soup that's paired with smoky shellfish for fantastic flavour. Vegetarian mussels? Missy Hui says "no worries!" and makes Saffron Artichokes with zesty Lemon Chili Oil - there's a little bit of everything in each delectable bite! How does Poppy Sandler send the episode off? By turning it on its head! Fried mussels with Celeriac Remoulade salad makes for a satisfying ending to Up the Dish.

programme.title: Up the Dish
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Paella
programme.desc: In this episode of Up the Dish, steal away to Spain for a summer vacation as host Tiera Singh takes a swing at Paella, complete with sunny saffron, saucy sofrito, and super crunchy soccarat. Next, Missy Hui takes a break for brunch with Chorizo Eggs Benedict - the Saffron Hollandaise is good as gold and twice as bright! Poppy Sandler follows with her Fritto Misto and Sofrito, a delicate and fresh veggie fry-up that soaks up a tomato-spiked sofrito dipping sauce. Micah Trainor finishes up with restaurant-ready Razor Clams steamed in sparkling Spanish wine, served alongside nutty Iberico Ham and sweet Manchego cheese.

programme.title: Cook the Books
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Baking Wisdom
programme.desc: Chef-host Shahir Massoud tries out recipes from another award-winning cookbook: Anna Olson’s Baking Wisdom! Follow along as Shahir makes a breakfast galette, a classic apple tart, a rich brown butter pecan pie, and much more!

programme.desc: Emilia Romagna is the culinary heart of Italy and Chef Michael Bonacini shows viewers how to make some of the region's most delicious dishes.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E15 Cheese and Chocolate
programme.desc: Cheese or chocolate? Why not both! In this "C" challenge, host Theresa Visintin takes on both decadent ingredients. But first, she shows us that being cheesy is easy, especially when you stuff chicken breast with creamy goat's cheese and finely diced apples. Theresa takes the flavour one step further by coating the stuffed chicken with sage, parmesan, and panko bread crumbs, then frying it to a crispy golden brown. Next, Theresa whips up a dessert fan favourite, the decadent and oh-so-irresistible dark chocolate lava cake. Finally, Theresa has an irresistible recipe using ooey gooey cheese and warm chocolate.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 Sicily
programme.desc: Simplicity is key with Sicilian cuisine and Chef Michael Bonacini explores just how the region balances simplicity with intensity through four flavourful dishes. Starting with an antipasto of Folded Flatbread with Ricotta and Fennel Seeds, Michael inspires with its intricate beauty with a simple recipe. Keeping to the theme of simplicity, Michael shows that plenty of flavour can come from little ingredients in his primo of Broccoli and Sausage Rigatoni. The spicy sausage and chili is countered by a creamy broccoli pesto for a dish that highlights Sicilian cuisine. Michael turns to the Italian queen of crops for his secondo: Eggplant Parmesan Roll-Ups. With thin slices of eggplant rolled up to contain a mouth-watering mixture of mozzarella, provolone, and pecorino romano, this dish gets an extra kick of flavour from a coating of breadcrumbs and tomato sauce. To bring it all together, Michael combines spicy with sweet through his tender Spiced Chocolate Cookies.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Sweet, Salty, and Surprising Multi-Cooker Recipes
programme.desc: Using a multi-cooker, charming host Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks up a four dishes that are salty, sweet, and surprising.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Spicing it Up
programme.desc: Spice lovers rejoice as the griddle ignites with bold flavor. From smoky peppers to bright heat and layered seasoning, this exploration celebrates the art of balancing fire and flavor. Home cooks experiment with spice to create dishes that bring warmth and excitement to every bite.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 Kid Tested, Kid Approved
programme.desc: Imagination meets the warmth of the griddle in dishes designed for kids’ tastes. Playful shapes, bright flavors, and familiar favorites come together to charm even the pickiest palates with every bite.

programme.title: Up the Dish
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 Ceviche
programme.desc: Host Tiera Singh goes on a South American tour with Peruvian Ceviche. Marinated citrusy seabass and shrimp swim in a sea of sweet potatoes and creamy avocado - it's hard to beat! But Poppy Sandler takes a shot, and lands on Grilled Shrimp with a smoky charred Corn and Avocado salad, topped with garlic and lemon grilled jumbo shrimp. Next, Missy Hui indulges her sweet tooth with Vegan Key Lime Tarts. Her trick? Using avocado for extra cream and extra green. Branzino with Shishito and Mango is how Micah Trainor scales it up - her whole-fish-dish is pan-roasted and spiced with chaat masala, topped with mangoes and blistered shishito peppers for a five-star feast!

programme.title: Up the Dish
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Lasagna
programme.desc: How do you make any lasagna recipe better? Ask Tiera Singh to take it up, of course! Her 'Nonna-style' bechamel and Bolognese-based Lasagna is topped with melty mozzarella for a luscious and luxuriant dish. Tiera tosses it over to Poppy Sandler, whose sideways Seafood Lasagna mixes up mussels, shrimp, and a briny bechamel sauce - yum! Next, Micah Trainor makes a dressed-up vegetarian version of the classic - her Zucchini-Mushroom Lasagna Rolls with tangy sundried tomatoes, savoury ricotta cheese, and earthy mushroom duxelles is simply superlative. Missy Hui hits the sweet spot with her Chocolate Raspberry Dessert Lasagna; layers of rich white chocolate, thick raspberry coulis, and velvety mascarpone cheese come together for a dessert that's in the stratosphere!

programme.title: Up the Dish
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Dumplings
programme.desc: In this episode of Up the Dish, host Missy Hui goes back to her childhood with Chicken and Dumplings - comfort food for every age! The chicken-dumpling journey doesn't end there; Micah Trainor turns the dish upside down and inside out with her Chinese-inspired Chicken-Chive Gyoza, a crunchy-crispy dim sum delight, with an ovERS-the-top chili sauce! How does Poppy Sandler spice things up? Herb Gnudi with Red Pepper Sauce, a spicy-savoury dumpling that's coated in nutty brown butter and creamy ricotta cheese for extra oomph. Tiera Singh finishes with another European dish - Spinach Spaetzle and Crispy Prosciutto, straight from Germany! Chewy spaetzle, fresh spinach, crispy ham - this textural treat doesn't let up!

programme.title: Up the Dish
programme.sub-title: S01 : E18 Fennel Orange Salad
programme.desc: Host Tiera Singh gets the show on the road with her Italian- inspired Fennel Orange Salad. Seared sushi-grade tuna rests on top of a crunchy, zesty, tangy fennel and orange salad with a honey-vinegar dressing to sweeten it up! Micah Trainor's revamp? Five Spice Duck a L'Orange with a sugary caramelized orange sauce and duck fat fried potatoes - is it French? Chinese? Who knows, but it's delicious! Next, Poppy Sandler pulls off a vegetarian variation, with a Roasted Veggie Bouillabaisse, complete with musky morels, umami-packed kombu, and tender asparagus. Missy Hui finishes up with her Orange Licorice Panna Cotta - aromatic orange blossom honey and licorice-like fennel pollen make the dish a decadent denouement to this episode of Up the Dish!

programme.title: Up the Dish
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Moules Frites
programme.desc: Crack open a mussel or two, this episode of Up the Dish begins in Belgium, but please, no waffles! Host Micah Trainor makes Moules- Frites, mussels steamed in white wine and shows her trick for bistro- style French fries. Next, Tiera Singh steals the show with her Mussel Broth Vichyssoise and Smoked Mussels, an ultra-creamy cold soup that's paired with smoky shellfish for fantastic flavour. Vegetarian mussels? Missy Hui says "no worries!" and makes Saffron Artichokes with zesty Lemon Chili Oil - there's a little bit of everything in each delectable bite! How does Poppy Sandler send the episode off? By turning it on its head! Fried mussels with Celeriac Remoulade salad makes for a satisfying ending to Up the Dish.

programme.title: Up the Dish
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Paella
programme.desc: In this episode of Up the Dish, steal away to Spain for a summer vacation as host Tiera Singh takes a swing at Paella, complete with sunny saffron, saucy sofrito, and super crunchy soccarat. Next, Missy Hui takes a break for brunch with Chorizo Eggs Benedict - the Saffron Hollandaise is good as gold and twice as bright! Poppy Sandler follows with her Fritto Misto and Sofrito, a delicate and fresh veggie fry-up that soaks up a tomato-spiked sofrito dipping sauce. Micah Trainor finishes up with restaurant-ready Razor Clams steamed in sparkling Spanish wine, served alongside nutty Iberico Ham and sweet Manchego cheese.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Sicily
programme.desc: Rice Balls Stuffed with Seafood and Pistachio Cannoli are on the menu as Chef Michael Bonacini explores dishes from the Italian island of Sicily.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Piemonte
programme.desc: Piemonte cuisine is influenced by its mountainous terrain. Chef Michael Bonacini shows us how to make its warm regional dishes like Bagna Cauda.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Crusted/Coated
programme.desc: High-energy chef and seafood expert Spencer Watts shows how crusts and coatings add tantalizing texture to rich tuna and fresh, tangy oysters.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Hidden
programme.desc: Who doesn't love a surprise? Seafood loving Chef Spencer Watts makes perch and crab the hidden star in tamales, dumplings, spring rolls and poppers.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Salty
programme.desc: Meaty prawns and melt-in-your-mouth cod are on the menu as trendy chef and seafood expert Spencer Watts gets a little "salty" with seafood.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Citrus
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts shows how the burst of acidity from lemon, lime, orange and grapefruit adds enticing flavor to mild mahi-mahi and sweet scallops.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Spicing it Up
programme.desc: Spice lovers rejoice as the griddle ignites with bold flavor. From smoky peppers to bright heat and layered seasoning, this exploration celebrates the art of balancing fire and flavor. Home cooks experiment with spice to create dishes that bring warmth and excitement to every bite.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Desserts that Sizzle
programme.desc: Sweet classics meet modern flair as the griddle transforms sugar, butter, and batter into sizzling masterpieces. Explore dessert history while crafting fresh creations that bubble, melt, and delight.

programme.title: The Latin Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Venezuela's National Bread
programme.desc: Passionate cook Juan Pablo Gonzalez introduces us to the arepa, a Venezuelan specialty, and shows four different and delicious fillings.

programme.title: Cook the Books
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Baking Wisdom
programme.desc: Chef-host Shahir Massoud tries out recipes from another award-winning cookbook: Anna Olson’s Baking Wisdom! Follow along as Shahir makes a breakfast galette, a classic apple tart, a rich brown butter pecan pie, and much more!

programme.title: Cook the Books
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Eat, Habibi, Eat!
programme.desc: Chef-host Shahir Massoud prepares recipes from his own award-winning cookbook, Eat, Habibi, Eat! Follow along as Shahir prepares a beautiful beet dip, Egyptian-inspired lamb chops, grilled whole fish, and much more!

programme.title: Blitz!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E10 More Poppy Sandler
programme.desc: BLITZ! is an all-new cooking show! Imagine being next Poppy Sandler as they cook their fav dishes!

programme.title: Blitz!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 Pino Di Cerbo
programme.desc: BLITZ! is an all-new cooking show! Imagine being next to Pino Di Cerbo as they cook their fav dishes!

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S02 : E12 Sweet & Salty Desserts
programme.desc: Which tasty treats tantalize your taste buds? Sweet and salty ones, of course! Host Jessica McGovern shows us some of her favourites.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S02 : E13 Rainbow Galaxy Party
programme.desc: Nothing is more mesmerizing than outer space! Host Jessica McGovern bakes delicious desserts with a galaxy-inspired twist.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Italian Sweets
programme.desc: Host Jessica McGovern bakes up some delightful Italian classics including a crumbly Cherry-pistachio Biscotti.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Fancy French Flavours
programme.desc: Talented baker Jessica McGovern shows us how to get fancy with three stunning French desserts.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E05 Coconut and Crab
programme.desc: In this "C" challenge, Chef Robert Jewell cooks up recipes using coconut and crab before combining both into a single recipe. Using sweet coconut, Robert makes a classic dessert -- an irresistible coconut cream pie. He starts with a delectable crunchy graham cracker crust and tops his pie with fluffy whipped cream and toasted coconut flakes. Next, Robert transforms a fresh soft-shell crab into a delicious, spicy, and crunchy dish. The best part? It's fast and easy to make. After soaking the crab in milk, Robert dunks it into a flour-cornmeal mixture and fries it until golden brown. But that's not all, Robert whips up the perfect dipping sauce, using spicy smoked- jalapeno, lime, and orange adobo mayo. Finally, Robert brings coconut and crab into one delicious dish.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E13 Sesame and Scallops
programme.desc: It's all about sesame and scallops in this letter "S" challenge, and host Theresa Visintin has some appetizing ideas up her sleeve. First, she shows us how to make scallop cassoulet, a simple recipe that can be cooked even faster than it can eaten! Theresa browns the tender scallops in delicious bacon fat and then bakes it on a bed of creamy kidney beans. Next, Theresa uses sesame seeds to create a zesty sauce for a take-out favourite, made in your very own kitchen - noodles! For her final recipe, our culinary host combines sesame and scallops, creating a juicy, crunchy masterpiece.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E21 Water Chestnut and Watercress
programme.desc: Making dishes with the letter “W” could be seen as a real challenge, but Chef Lauren Gulyas has got it covered. Choosing water chestnut and watercress as her star ingredients, Chef Lauren begins by serving up an Asian inspired rice dish complete with crunchy water chestnuts. She starts off cooking rice in chicken broth, a great way to infuse the grain with a subtle savoury flavour. Sautéing celery, garlic, and onion in sesame oil adds a flavour kick. Throw in some ginger, veggies, and water chestnuts and enjoy the sound of the sizzle. Next up, Lauren puts a peppery twist on a classic recipe, linguine with watercress pesto. Then it’s time for the grand finale, Chef Lauren uses both ingredients to create the ultimate culinary combination.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 Tea and Turkey
programme.desc: Tea and turkey are an unlikely combo for a meal, but Chef Robert Jewell is a creative force in the kitchen. First, he gives earl grey and lavender tea a sweet treatment by making a rich semifreddo. Robert creates a silky tea infused syrup, which he drizzles over a luxurious custard and tops with whipped cream. Robert punches up the colour by adding tart poached raspberries and vibrant violet lavender petals. Now, it's time for a real show stopper - saffron turkey kebabs with pomegranate rice. This is not your average turkey dinner. First, Robert marinates the turkey pieces in lime, yogourt and garlic. After infusing basmati rice with aromatic saffron and bay leaves, Robert tosses the rice with crunchy pine nuts and sweet pomegranate - the perfect bed for his grilled to- perfection turkey skewers. Robert then takes his culinary skills to the next level when he uses tea and turkey in one single delicious dish.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Tuscany
programme.desc: Chef Michael Bonacini uses the fresh ingredients from rich Tuscan soil to make regional dishes like Spinach Ricotta Gnudi.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Le Marche
programme.desc: Celebrity Chef Michael Bonacini explores classic dishes from the central Italian region, Le Marche.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy

programme.desc: The secluded region of Abruzzo makes for unique Italian cuisine. Chef Michael Bonacini shows us diverse regional recipes like Rolled Meat Crepes.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Puglia
programme.desc: Pasta, bread, pizza dough! Host Michael Bonacini makes Apulian classics like Artichoke Cheese Panzerotti.

programme.desc: In Arequipa, Milagros has set out to peel back the layers of her country’s history.

programme.title: 10 Days Estonia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 10 Days Estonia Aidu
programme.desc: Tallinn, Estonia’s capital, is known for its quaint, medieval Old Town but Italian nomad couple, Marco and Erica discover other sides to the city by visiting offbeat attractions such as the Seaplane Harbour Museum and Telliskivi Creative City, a hub of artists. They also tuck into a medieval feast at Olde Hansa Inn. Following this, they have an off-roading adventure at Aidu oil shale quarry.

programme.title: Xplore Belgium
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Xplore Belgium, Bruges 2
programme.desc: Market square of Bruges is lined up with restaurants and cafes. The city is also home to golden fries or french fries, but are originated in Belgium.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.sub-title: S01 : E22 City Breaks Bundi, India
programme.desc: From stunning palaces to ornate stepwells, Asmita finds herself soaking in the romance of Bundi, a charming 14th century town in Rajasthan.

programme.title: Quest
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Quest Delhi 3, India
programme.desc: From papad ka paratha to lehsun ki kheer, Chef Aditya Jaimini shows Alex Outhwaite how to make some of the unusual dishes from Indian cuisine.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Backpack Split and Salona, Croatia
programme.desc: Explore the beautiful Dalmatian coast with a little history of Split with Alex and stay tuned as next she explores the port city of Salona.

programme.title: Viajar Peru
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Viajar Peru Titicaca
programme.desc: Amidst the sapphire expanse of Lake Titicaca, Milagros embarks on a journey of reconnecting with her roots. Delving into the secrets of the Uros, she unveils their timeless artistry in building floating islands, a testament to human resilience. But as she travels to Amantani Island, an enigma awaits—a forgotten temple, rituals that date back to the pre-Incan times, chapters of Peru’s lesser-explored history waiting to unfold.

programme.title: 10 Days Estonia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 10 Days Estonia Narva
programme.desc: Marco and Erica get to know about the dark history of Estonia while exploring the remains of Narva, the country’s third largest city at its easternmost limit. From the fortress of Narva and the bastions of Narva to an abandoned textile mill, everything tells them about the intriguing story of the town. They also learn about the Russian and ‘alien’ people living here.

programme.title: Xplore Belgium
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Xplore Belgium, Antwerp 1
programme.desc: Renowned as the world's leading city of diamonds, it also holds about possessing the second largest port in whole of Europe.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.sub-title: S01 : E24 City Breaks Bikaner
programme.desc: Bikaner is known to most people as the city of world-famous savoury snacks. When Asmita goes there for a whirlwind trip, however, she discovers that there is a lot more to Rajasthan’s Red City than meets the eye. From the miniature paintings that can be found on the walls of palaces and mansions across the city to the elaborate architecture of the former havelis of merchants, she finds out that Bikaner is an art lover’s paradise.

programme.title: Quest
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Quest Amritsar, India

programme.title: Backpack

programme.desc: Watch a musical instrument powered by sea waves and learn how glassware was made in Roman era. This and more with Alexandra in Zadar episode

programme.title: Viajar Peru
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Viajar Peru Cusco
programme.desc: Milagros visits the ancient city of Cusco just in time for the legendary Inti Raymi Festival, a gateway to the Inca empire's beliefs. Hidden in the vibrant festivities, which continue into the night, are glimpses into the lives led by the people during the Inca era.

programme.title: 10 Days Estonia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 10 Days Estonia Setomaa
programme.desc: Marco and Erica soak in the vitality of the student town, Tartu, and experience its eccentricities at the Leaning House and the AHHAA Science Centre. Following this, they visit Obinista, the cultural centre of Setomaa, where the Seto community introduces them to the traditional ways of dressing, singing and dancing. They also indulge in a traditional smoke sauna at nearby Võromaa.

programme.title: Xplore Belgium
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Xplore Belgium, Antwerp 2
programme.desc: Antwerp has grown on the banks of the Scheldt River that alongwith the Meuse and the Rhine forms the biggest estuary in western Europe.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Quest Hoshiyaarpur, India
programme.desc: You won't find anything more comforting than food made from scratch.Join Alex in Hoshiarpur as she finds old cuisines.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Backpack, Plitvice Lopar and Zagreb Croatia
programme.desc: Alexandra in this episode explores Plitvice, where she visits a national park, interacts with locals, tastes local wine and then leaves for Zagreb.

programme.title: Viajar Peru

programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 10 Days Estonia Sooma National Park
programme.desc: Embracing Estonia’s largest area of swamps, meadows and waterside forests, Soomaa National Park is the second largest national park in the country. While trying out bog walking and camping over here, Marco and Erica experience what is known as the “fifth season” in Estonia, the season of floods. They also explore Tallinn’s history with espionage, and go on to soak in the romance at its Christmas Market.

But the real thunder of the Highlands awaits at the Braemar Games gathering, where tartan meets brawn, and Robbie learns that embracing his Scottish side involves more than just kilts and castles.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E27 Backpack Novi Sad, Serbia

programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Boarding Pass Santa Village, Finland

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Xplore Bulgaria Sunny Beach
programme.desc: Luxurious hotels, thrilling water parks, inexpensive food and almost 300 days of bright sunny weather make Bulgaria’s biggest seaside resort, Sunny Beach popular for budget beach getaways. Catriona, however, stumbles onto the historic town of Nessebar, which is over 3000 years old, and realizes that there is more to the place than meets the eye. She goes on to visit the Castra Rubra winery, where she finds out about the history of Viticulture in Bulgaria and the process of wine making.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.sub-title: S01 : E21 City Breaks Ahmedabad (ENG)

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Food Fact Fun The Hague, Netherlands
programme.desc: From exploring a vintage car museum to scaling a 5 meter ice-wall and sampling a rich bread cookie, Watch Alex exploring The Hague, also known as the “International city of peace”.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 10 Days Scotland Aberdeen (ENG)
programme.desc: A modern European oil city built on the back of a rich maritime heritage, Aberdeen is the energetic kingpin of northeast Scotland. While the boom times may come and go, the dynamic coastal metropolis never ceases to thrill with its free museums, outdoor adventures and natural attractions right on the city’s doorstep.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E28 Backpack Pozarevac, Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Požarevac and visits the ancient town of Viminacium. Later visits National Museum, concluding with Majdanpek’s Rajkova Pecina Caves.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Boarding Pass Rovaniemi, Finland

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Xplore Bulgaria Sofia
programme.desc: For the people of Sofia, preserving its heritage is sacrosanct, and this can be seen in the way the city's infrastructure is built around its archeological treasures. Catriona realizes this when she roams around the cobblestone streets of the city. With every monument she visits, she finds herself transported to a different era, right from Perperikon fort, which narrate stories of the Byzantine empire, to Boyana church, which is home to some of the earliest examples of medieval artwork.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Great World Hotels, Four Seasons 1(Eng)
programme.desc: From lazing in hammocks by the beach to sipping drinks on a private yacht, Kim realizes that Maldives is the perfect destination to unwind in style.

On a visit to Paro, Radhika explores famous monasteries such as the Rinpung Dzong and Takstang Monastery, and learns the history and legends associated with them. Along the way, she finds out the secrets to the quintessential Bhutanese peace and contentment.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Food Fact Fun Amsterdam, Netherlands
programme.desc: In Amsterdam, Alex tries Bitterballen, cannabis cake and visits Heineken Experience brewery. He explores Zaanse Schans village with windmills and Coster Diamonds, the oldest diamond polishing factory.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 10 Days Scotland Edinburgh (ENG)
programme.desc: Robbie’s journey to reconnect with his Scottish roots begins in Edinburgh, the stunning capital city perched on extinct volcanoes. Navigating the twists of the Royal Mile, strutting around the majestic Edinburgh castle and learning to sip scotch like a true Scotsman, he feels a tad closer to his heritage. The real fun kicks in, however, when he stumbles onto a rather flamboyant way to unleash his inner Highlander.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Xplore Bulgaria Plovdiv
programme.desc: Like Rome, Plovdiv straddles seven hills; but as Europe’s oldest continuously inhabited city, it’s far more ancient. As Catriona takes a tour of the city to see its iconic attractions such as a Roman Amphitheatre, which was once the setting for gladiator fights, and the striking Baroque Saints Constantine and Helena Church, she begins to see how seamlessly modern life blends with the age-old ruins. Along the way, she realizes why Plovdiv is called the ‘Eternal City’ of Bulgaria.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E29 XP Guide, Stockholm
programme.desc: Stockholm, the capital and largest city of Sweden, was built on 14 Islands. This place is also sometimes referred as Venice of the north.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E26 Backpack Belgrade, Serbia
programme.desc: Visit Belgrade, with Heather as she explores the city, its architecture and learns about its past by visiting historical monuments.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 10 Days Scotland Perth (ENG)
programme.desc: Robbie’s adventures in Perth kick off with him immersing himself in the historic grandeur of the Scone Castle, where a mysterious stone tells tales of Scottish monarchs. But the real thunder of the Highlands awaits at the Braemar Games gathering, where tartan meets brawn, and Robbie learns that embracing his Scottish side involves more than just kilts and castles.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E27 Backpack Novi Sad, Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Novi Sad, the financial and industrial hub of Serbia.Starting with canoeing on Danube and later exploring the city and its landmarks.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Boarding Pass Santa Village, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to Santa Village at Rovaniemi, where she reads some of the letters that children from around the world write to him.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Xplore Bulgaria Sunny Beach
programme.desc: Luxurious hotels, thrilling water parks, inexpensive food and almost 300 days of bright sunny weather make Bulgaria’s biggest seaside resort, Sunny Beach popular for budget beach getaways. Catriona, however, stumbles onto the historic town of Nessebar, which is over 3000 years old, and realizes that there is more to the place than meets the eye. She goes on to visit the Castra Rubra winery, where she finds out about the history of Viticulture in Bulgaria and the process of wine making.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.sub-title: S01 : E21 City Breaks Ahmedabad (ENG)
programme.desc: Benafsha embarks on a whirlwind adventure in Ahmedabad. With just 48 hours in the city, she is determined to make the most of it, but how?

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Food Fact Fun The Hague, Netherlands
programme.desc: From exploring a vintage car museum to scaling a 5 meter ice-wall and sampling a rich bread cookie, Watch Alex exploring The Hague, also known as the “International city of peace”.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 10 Days Scotland Aberdeen (ENG)
programme.desc: A modern European oil city built on the back of a rich maritime heritage, Aberdeen is the energetic kingpin of northeast Scotland. While the boom times may come and go, the dynamic coastal metropolis never ceases to thrill with its free museums, outdoor adventures and natural attractions right on the city’s doorstep.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E28 Backpack Pozarevac, Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Požarevac and visits the ancient town of Viminacium. Later visits National Museum, concluding with Majdanpek’s Rajkova Pecina Caves.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Boarding Pass Rovaniemi, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to Rovaniemi, where she visits a husky farm and finds out about about breeding and raising huskies.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Xplore Bulgaria Sofia
programme.desc: For the people of Sofia, preserving its heritage is sacrosanct, and this can be seen in the way the city's infrastructure is built around its archeological treasures. Catriona realizes this when she roams around the cobblestone streets of the city. With every monument she visits, she finds herself transported to a different era, right from Perperikon fort, which narrate stories of the Byzantine empire, to Boyana church, which is home to some of the earliest examples of medieval artwork.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Great World Hotels, Four Seasons 1(Eng)
programme.desc: From lazing in hammocks by the beach to sipping drinks on a private yacht, Kim realizes that Maldives is the perfect destination to unwind in style.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E26 Mammut Biggest Peak Project 2 - USA
programme.desc: The Swiss mountaineering company Mammut is celebrating its 150th anniversary with the largest summit project in history: 150 summit ascents are being organized worldwide as part of the “150 Peaks Project”.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E29 Kayaking Kerala - Part 1
programme.desc: An international team of kayaking world champions and experienced expeditionists have set out to conquer the wild waters of Kerala. Hardly any other region in the world offers such a wide variety of powerful rapids and waterfalls.

programme.title: Simple Session 2024 - BMX Final
programme.desc: Simple Session was born in 2000, starting as a small-town competition, it has now blossomed into one of the world's largest and most prestigious BMX and skateboarding contests. Simple Session 24 is set on August 24-25, promising a spectacular festival!

programme.title: One Water Race 2024
programme.desc: The concept is straight forward; starting at Arholma in the north, the first to reach Landsort in the south is crowned the winner. Running and swimming the only method of movement. No track and free choice of route but with some unknown check points needed to pass along the way.

programme.title: Simple Session 2024 - Highlight Show Skate
programme.desc: Simple Session was born in 2000, starting as a small-town competition, it has now blossomed into one of the world's largest and most prestigious BMX and skateboarding contests. Simple Session 24 is set on August 24-25, promising a spectacular festival!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E41 E-Bike Festival Verbier 2020
programme.desc: The Verbier E-Bike Festival is taking place in Val de Bagnes for the second time this summer! 4 days dedicated to e-biking! With 5 different activities on offer: E-Bike Test, Rando Gourmande, Discovery Trails, E-Tour du Val de Bagnes or Bosch E-MTB Challenge.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 Cape Epic 2022 - Men
programme.desc: The Absa Cape Epic is the world’s premier mountain bike stage race. The route changes every year, leading aspiring amateur and professional mountain bikers through 650 Untamed kilometres of unspoilt scenery and up 16 000m of climbing.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.sub-title: S01 : E18 Cape Epic 2022 - Women
programme.desc: The Absa Cape Epic is the world’s premier mountain bike stage race. The route changes every year, leading aspiring amateur and professional mountain bikers through 650 Untamed kilometres of unspoilt scenery and up 16 000m of climbing.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.sub-title: S01 : E29 E-Bike World Tour 2022 - Flachau (AUT)
programme.desc: The E-Race at the Flachau E-Bike Festival 2022 is probably one of the most spectacular races in e-bike sport and brings an international squad of top riders to Flachau.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Bermuda Gold Cup
programme.desc: Founded in 2000, the World Match Racing Tour (WMRT) features world class sailors including America’s Cup and Olympic champions, the WMRT brings together the very best match racing sailors in the world, in a global championship series.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021
programme.sub-title: S01 : E38 EngadinWind - IQ Foil World Championships
programme.desc: In today´s Episode we will visit the beautiful Silvaplanasee in Switzerland. It´s time for the Engadin Wind IQ Foil World Championships. Cold water and a thrilling contest format guarantee an exciting Show.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021
programme.sub-title: S01 : E43 EngadinWind - Overall Summary
programme.desc: For almost two weeks the lake Silvaplana in the wonderful valley of the Engadine will be the place to be for the international windsurf elite.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 X-Project 2.0
programme.desc: X-project 2.0 is a worldwide unique project where different winter sports unite in front of the backdrop of a Swiss dreamscape in the mountains of Engadin valley (Canton of Grisons).

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Slay the Bay
programme.desc: ‘Slay The Bay’ is a urban mountain bike adventure in the San Francisco Bay area. . Hans Rey, an icon in the bike scene, on this trip accompanied by fellow Freeride pioneer Brett Tippie.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 WOF 2024 #03: Greenlandic
programme.desc: In today´s episode we have the ultimate journey into the heart of Greenland´s rich culture and untamed backcountry. Join us as we explore the breathtaking landcapes of this Artic wonderland. It´s the paradise for every passionate freeskier. Let´s check out!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 WOF 2024 #05: Reconnect One - USA
programme.desc: Sarka and Cheryl, who haven't seen each other in years, have decided to reunite and embark on a tour of their own. Having once traveled together on the contest scene for over 15 years, life led them to different corners of the West Coast of America.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 WOF 2026 #08: Motosurf World Championship 2025 - Women & Stock R
programme.desc: The MotoSurf World Championship 2025 – Women & Stock R is part of the global racing series organized under the authority of the Union Internationale Motonautique. It brings together top riders who compete on motorized surfboards in fast and technical water circuits.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 WOF 2026 #09: SCOTT Mediterranen Epic
programme.desc: The SCOTT Mediterranean Epic is an international mountain bike stage race held annually in Spain, mainly in the Costa Blanca region. It brings together professional and amateur riders from all over the world to compete over several days in challenging off-road stages.

programme.title: 2025 iQFOiL World Championships - Live Delayed Part 1
programme.desc: Aarhus, Denmark, became the venue for the iQFOiL World Championships from July 4-11, 2025, offering the world's best windsurfing athletes a test of skill and speed. This world-class sailing venue has a reputation for pushing competitors to their limits

programme.desc: Today we continue our North American Odyssey with Sarka Pancochova and Cheryl Maas in Reconnect Two. From Mt Baker and the legendary Bank Slalom to backcountry kickers in Bend get ready for the full Pacific Northwest snowboard experience.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E18 WOF 2024 #18: If it’s easy it’s not fun

programme.desc: Recovering from testicular cancer, professional athlete and filmmaker Maarten Molenaar embarks on a journey to Fuerteventura to learn a new freestyle windsurfing trick - the Pasko.

programme.title: LINE OF SIGHT | A Look into Wingsuit BASE Jumping
programme.desc: The golden age of wingsuiting is upon us. Through evolving suit technology the initial inflation time has gone down, which has lead to quicker starts and more exits. Wingsuit athletes Marshal Miller, Jesse Hall, and Sean Chuma take you through the iconic jumps.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E28 WOF 2025 #28: Queen & King of the Court 2025
programme.desc: The spectacular Queen & King of the Court 2025 beach volleyball event returns to Hamburg from May 23 to 25! For the fifth time in a row, the best players in the world will compete against each other in Hamburg. Level brought to life.

programme.title: World Downhill Skateboarding Championships Round 4 - Utah (USA) – Women's Skate & Luge + Open Street Luge
programme.desc: Park City Downhill, located in the heart of Utah's picturesque Wasatch Mountains, is the venue for the fourth round of the Downhill Skateboarding World Championships. Riders race down a 1.6 km course near Park City.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.sub-title: S01 : E33 E-Bike World Tour 2022 - Tignes & Val d’Isère (FRA)
programme.desc: As the second stop of the 2022 E-Bike World Tour, the UCI-accredited E-Tour de Haute-Tarentaise attracted professional and experienced amateur riders from different nations for two days of sublime stage racing across 85km of high alpine terrain.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.sub-title: S01 : E35 E-Bike World Tour 2022 - Verbier (SUI)
programme.desc: The Verbier E-Bike Festival has earned its special place in the heart of the e-bike community thanks to hosting the most iconic e-bike race of them all.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.sub-title: S01 : E40 World E-Bike Series 2022 Round 3 & 4
programme.desc: In todays Episode we´re traveling to France & Belgium for round 3 & 4 of the World E-Bike Series. The World’s best male & female mountain bikers are going to battle out who will take the lead in the middle of the racing calendar.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.sub-title: S01 : E43 World E-Bike Series 2022 Round 5 & 6
programme.desc: A long and exciting World E-Bike Series season enters its final two rounds in Girona and Barcelona. Who will be crowned the winner of the series this year? Let´s check out!

programme.title: GKA Kite-Surf World Cup 2024 - Dakhla (MAR) - Overall Highlights
programme.desc: The GKA Kite-Surf World Cup 2024 will take place in Dakhla. This Moroccan hotspot is known for its constant winds and breathtaking lagoon and offers perfect conditions for exciting freestyle performances.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2017
programme.sub-title: S01 : E43 adidas Sickline 2017 - Ötztal/AUT
programme.desc: Austria’s legendary “Wellerbrücke“ rapids are the setting for the Sickline Extreme Kayak World Championships. From October 5 to 7, 2017, the world’s best female and male whitewater kayakers meet at the big anniversary event at Ötztal Valley.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2019
programme.sub-title: S01 : E48 World Coastal Rowing Championships - Hong Kong (CHN)
programme.desc: For athletes and spectators alike, it’s the highlight of the coastal rowing season: the World Coastal Rowing Championships will take place in Hong Kong (China).

programme.title: THE RIO CAQUETA
programme.desc: Jules Domine and Tyler Bradt, obsessed and addicted to whitewater adventure, make a plan to journey the long way, from the source of Rio Caqueta 1,000 Kilometers downstream to an unreal big water canyon deep in the Colombian Amazon.

programme.title: A Plea For Refuge
programme.desc: Two adventurous friends, Jeff Shapiro and Cody Tuttle, have a desire to experience one of the last, raw, and truly preserved wilderness areas on the North American continent, attempt to hike and fly paraglider's across the Arctic National Wildlife Refuge in Alaska.

programme.title: BACK TO NORMAL
programme.desc: For Ian Mitchard jumping out of airplanes and soaring above the earth with a nylon canopy is as normal as walking through the grocery store. But when a dramatic accident put the lifestyle he loves in jeopardy, Ian is forced to grapple with his body.

programme.title: Cerro Torre Fly & Climb
programme.desc: The West Face route with its long glacier approach through the Circo de los Altares certainly feels ‘out there’. That the whole team were able to take off from the summit with their paragliders is a testament to their skill, both as climbers and as pilots.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 WOF 2026 #10 Epic Series - Change is Inevitable
programme.desc: Welcome back to the Epic Series 2026. In this first episode we will dive deep into the heads of the worlds thoughest Mountainbikers who have and will again battle it out in the Cape Epic stagerace. The Absa Cape Epic is a physically gruelling and mentally demanding.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 WOF 2026 #11 44CUP - Puerto Calero 2026
programme.desc: The 44Cup begins its new season in a venue that for years has formed a cornerstone of the circuit: Puerto Calero in Lanzarote, Canary Islands, owned and operated by the RC44 class’ long term partner Calero Marinas. 2026 marks the 19th year of racing for the RC44s.

programme.title: 2025 iQFOiL World Championships - Live Delayed Part 2
programme.desc: Aarhus, Denmark, became the venue for the iQFOiL World Championships from July 4-11, 2025, offering the world's best windsurfing athletes a test of skill and speed. This world-class sailing venue has a reputation for pushing competitors to their limits

programme.title: Freeride World Tour 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Freeride World Tour 2023 - stop #4 - Fieberbrunn Pro (AUT)
programme.desc: The Freeride World Tour 2023 has its fourth stop in Fieberbrunn, Austria - as always with the best freeriders from all over the world! The first part of the FWT finals takes place in Fieberbrunn, where the athletes have to conquer the imposing Wildseeloder.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E50 Winter Games Obsidian - Big Air
programme.desc: Winter Games NZ is the largest snow sports event in the southern hemisphere. Traditionally, it welcomes the world's best skiers and snowboarders to take part in the opening of the FIS Park and Pipe World Cup season and The North Face Frontier.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 WOF 2025 #10: World Rookie Tour - 20 Years Anniversary Documentary
programme.desc: Launched in 2005, the World Rookie Tour (WRT) is the largest international youth action sports series dedicated to developing the next generation of professional athletes in the sports of snowboarding, freeskiing, skateboarding and surfing.

programme.title: Golden Roof Challenge 2026 - Live delayed Part 1
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Actionclip GKA22 BigAir ESP TwinTip Women Strapless Overall

programme.title: Bentonville Bike Fest 2026 - Red Bull Double Down

programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 WOF 2026 #10 Epic Series - Change is Inevitable

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 WOF 2026 #11 44CUP - Puerto Calero 2026
programme.desc: The 44Cup begins its new season in a venue that for years has formed a cornerstone of the circuit: Puerto Calero in Lanzarote, Canary Islands, owned and operated by the RC44 class’ long term partner Calero Marinas. 2026 marks the 19th year of racing for the RC44s.

programme.title: GKA Kite-Surf World Cup 2024 - Dakhla (MAR) - Overall Highlights
programme.desc: The GKA Kite-Surf World Cup 2024 will take place in Dakhla. This Moroccan hotspot is known for its constant winds and breathtaking lagoon and offers perfect conditions for exciting freestyle performances.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2017
programme.sub-title: S01 : E43 adidas Sickline 2017 - Ötztal/AUT
programme.desc: Austria’s legendary “Wellerbrücke“ rapids are the setting for the Sickline Extreme Kayak World Championships. From October 5 to 7, 2017, the world’s best female and male whitewater kayakers meet at the big anniversary event at Ötztal Valley.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2019
programme.sub-title: S01 : E48 World Coastal Rowing Championships - Hong Kong (CHN)
programme.desc: For athletes and spectators alike, it’s the highlight of the coastal rowing season: the World Coastal Rowing Championships will take place in Hong Kong (China).

programme.title: 2025 iQFOiL World Championships - Live Delayed Part 2
programme.desc: Aarhus, Denmark, became the venue for the iQFOiL World Championships from July 4-11, 2025, offering the world's best windsurfing athletes a test of skill and speed. This world-class sailing venue has a reputation for pushing competitors to their limits

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.sub-title: S01 : E33 E-Bike World Tour 2022 - Tignes & Val d’Isère (FRA)
programme.desc: As the second stop of the 2022 E-Bike World Tour, the UCI-accredited E-Tour de Haute-Tarentaise attracted professional and experienced amateur riders from different nations for two days of sublime stage racing across 85km of high alpine terrain.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.sub-title: S01 : E35 E-Bike World Tour 2022 - Verbier (SUI)
programme.desc: The Verbier E-Bike Festival has earned its special place in the heart of the e-bike community thanks to hosting the most iconic e-bike race of them all.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.sub-title: S01 : E40 World E-Bike Series 2022 Round 3 & 4
programme.desc: In todays Episode we´re traveling to France & Belgium for round 3 & 4 of the World E-Bike Series. The World’s best male & female mountain bikers are going to battle out who will take the lead in the middle of the racing calendar.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.sub-title: S01 : E43 World E-Bike Series 2022 Round 5 & 6
programme.desc: A long and exciting World E-Bike Series season enters its final two rounds in Girona and Barcelona. Who will be crowned the winner of the series this year? Let´s check out!

programme.title: THE RIO CAQUETA
programme.desc: Jules Domine and Tyler Bradt, obsessed and addicted to whitewater adventure, make a plan to journey the long way, from the source of Rio Caqueta 1,000 Kilometers downstream to an unreal big water canyon deep in the Colombian Amazon.

programme.title: A Plea For Refuge
programme.desc: Two adventurous friends, Jeff Shapiro and Cody Tuttle, have a desire to experience one of the last, raw, and truly preserved wilderness areas on the North American continent, attempt to hike and fly paraglider's across the Arctic National Wildlife Refuge in Alaska.

programme.title: BACK TO NORMAL
programme.desc: For Ian Mitchard jumping out of airplanes and soaring above the earth with a nylon canopy is as normal as walking through the grocery store. But when a dramatic accident put the lifestyle he loves in jeopardy, Ian is forced to grapple with his body.

programme.title: Cerro Torre Fly & Climb
programme.desc: The West Face route with its long glacier approach through the Circo de los Altares certainly feels ‘out there’. That the whole team were able to take off from the summit with their paragliders is a testament to their skill, both as climbers and as pilots.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 WOF 2023 #04: King of the Court 2022 - Niterói, Rio de Janeiro (BRA)
programme.desc: Die dritte Station der King of the Court Crown Serie 2022 findet in Niterói, Rio de Janeiro, statt.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2017
programme.sub-title: S01 : E31 Mystic Sk8 Cup 2017 - Prague (CZE)
programme.desc: During the first weekend in July, Prague will be dominated by Mystic Sk8 Cup skateboarding festival, celebrating its 23th annual. This year’s MSC will be the largest skateboarding event on the European continent.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 WOF 2023 #03: NEOM Titan Desert Dash Saudi Arabia - Neom (KSA)
programme.desc: NEOM Titan Desert Saudi-Arabien ist viel mehr als ein MTB-Rennen. Es ist ein viertägiges Abenteuer mit ständigen sportlichen Herausforderungen.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 WOF 2023 #05: Nedbank Desert Dash 2022 - Namibia (NAM)
programme.desc: The Desert Dash is more than an endurance mountain bike race, it's a wild beast that lures you and challenges you. It is a 393 km long, 24 hour battle between man and nature, body and spirit.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 WOF 2023 #09: Mediterranean Epic 2023
programme.desc: Die 4. Edition des Mediterranean Epic ist der Auftakt der Mountainbike-Etappenrennen. Es ist ein 4-tägiges Rennen (UCI Hors Catégorie), das in Castellón, Oropesa del Mar (Spanien), stattfindet.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E23 WOF 2023 #23: Titan Desert Series 2023 - Morocco
programme.desc: In der heutigen Folge entdecken wir die ungezähmte Landschaft und die wunderschöne Wüste von Marokko. Wir machen einen 6-tägigen Mountainbike-Trip durch die spektakulären Sanddünen und werden beim diesjährigen Titan Desert 2023 epische Bike-Action erleben.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E28 Coldwater Classic Series 2010 - Documentary
programme.desc: The Cold Water Classic events feature $15,000 for the winner of each event and $50,000 for the series winner. The Cold Water Classic is the first series of its kind and takes place in some of the world's rougher surf spots.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E40 VANORA Engadinwind by DAKINE - Racing
programme.desc: For almost two weeks, Lake Silvaplana in the beautiful Engadine will be the meeting point for the international windsurfing elite. With more than 300 participants from over 30 countries worldwide, the Engandinwind is the largest windsurf foil event of all time.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E44 VANORA Engadinwind by DAKINE - Foiling
programme.desc: For almost two weeks, Lake Silvaplana in the beautiful Engadin will be the meeting point for the international windsurfing elite. With more than 300 participants from over 30 countries worldwide, the Engandinwind is the largest windsurf foil event of all time.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 WOF 2025 #04: Maneuvre Vancouvre - with Hans Rey
programme.desc: In “Maneuver Vancouver”, mountain bike icons Hans Rey, Steve Peat and Wade Simmons embark on an exciting five-day journey through Vancouver. Join these three legends as they explore this iconic city.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 WOF 2025 #05: 10 Years LAAX OPEN Documentary
programme.desc: The Laax Open has been a meeting place for winter sports fans for years. See the best riders, breathtaking performances and unforgettable moments that have shaped the history of freestyle culture.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 WOF 2025 #15: Come Hell or High Water - Tibet extreme kayaking adventure
programme.desc: This week we are heading to the tibetian Hymalayans. Under the famous peaks and ridges, down in the deep valleya, lays the playground of some extreme sportsmen.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E35 WOF 2025 #35: LENA
programme.desc: In this episode of “World of Freesports,” we accompany Lena Kenma as she takes on one of the biggest challenges of her surfing career: her first attempt to conquer the legendary giant waves of Nazaré.

programme.title: Lords of Tram GKA Big Air Kite World Cup France 2025 - 26min-HL
programme.desc: The second stop of the GKA Big Air 2025 season is about to kick-off at Lords of Tram in the legendary spot of Barcarès, France, powered by the epic Tramontana winds that sweep down off the snow-capped Pyrenees.

programme.title: Motosurf Melco GP of Macau 2025 - HL show 1
programme.desc: The Motosurf Melco GP of Macau 2025 brings high-speed water racing to one of Asia’s most iconic motorsport destinations. Set against the striking backdrop of Macau’s coastline, the event showcases the world’s top motosurf athletes
